title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 522.130 - When proceeds distributed pro rata
text:
522.130.  When proceeds distributed pro rata. — If several judgments be obtained at the same term upon any official bond for damages, amounting in the whole to more than the sum for which sureties therein are liable, the court shall order the money levied on such judgments from the property of the sureties to be distributed to the relators, respectively, on such judgments, in proportion to the amount of their respective recoveries.
(RSMo 1939 § 3254) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2866; 1919 § 1016; 1909 § 1223
